title: Effects of introgressed Neanderthal alleles on present-day brain morphology
abstract_snippet: 370 MRI brain traits in 40k UKB. Neanderthal regulatory variants affect brain morphology. Neuropsychiatric trait connections.
summary: Neanderthal-derived regulatory variants shape brain morphology in 40k UKB participants. 8 fine-mapped loci, polygenic effects on neuropsychiatric traits (schizophrenia, depression). Relevant as example of regulatory variant effects on brain structure at population scale.
